center.name: 涅恩布庫省
center.summary: 涅恩布庫省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-billed scythebill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hellmayri, southwestern Paraguay's Ñeembucú Department and northern Argentina as far south as Entre Ríos Province The red-billed scythebill inhabits a wide variety of wooded landscapes, most of which are open to semi-open

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: hellmayri, southwestern Paraguay's Ñeembucú Department and northern Argentina as far south as Entre Ríos Province The red-billed scythebill inhabits a wide variety of wooded landscapes, most of which are open to semi-open
